---
title: "Interactive Visualizations"
subtitle: "HW5 deliverable — three interactive views of U.S. diabetes trial access"
author: "Chen Zhang"
date: today
jupyter: python3
---

> **Figures 1, 2, and 3 on this page are interactive.** Hover, toggle layers, and apply filters to explore.

*Content populated in Phase 1 (HW5 figures). Scaffolded page is live so the site skeleton renders cleanly.*
